subject: Small round-faced figure with white face and red cheek markings in green outfit channeling glowing energy
description: The same distinctive small, round figure with a white spherical face and circular red cheek markings appears here in a more dynamic power stance than TB2-044. Glowing green energy swirls around the figure and a large glowing symbol (appearing to be a Chinese or kanji character) blazes behind them. The overall composition suggests a psychic or energy-based ability activating. The green cap and outfit are consistent with the character's known design.
foreground: Small round figure with white face in power stance surrounded by glowing energy
background: Glowing kanji/symbol in green and gold energy effects
